source_policy.license_note: External news images are referenced by URL only. Do not commit or redistribute source images without a separate license review.
source_policy.neutrality_note: This record is source-attributed avatar reference metadata and should not imply guilt, conviction, or factual claims beyond cited public sources.
source_policy.yt_dlp_scope: yt-dlp is used only against the NBC article page to capture embedded media metadata. Direct image URLs are kept as external visual references only.

source_page.yt_dlp_title: Videos show Joseph Fischer's involvement in the Jan. 6 Capitol riot
source_page.note: The NBC-specific yt-dlp extractor errored on this page, so the generic extractor was forced and successfully found the embedded media metadata.

visual_reference_notes.source: Derived from provided external reference image URLs for avatar art direction only.
high_level_appearance: neutral forward-facing expression in the ABC27 reference image
avoid: Do not include news outlet graphics or watermarks in generated avatar assets.
Do not include inmate/prison context unless explicitly needed for a cited historical reference scene.
Do not infer personal details not present in source metadata.

avatar_generation_guidance.preferred_reference_mode: Use external URLs as human art references; keep generated game assets clearly production-created.
metahuman_notes: Create a realistic adult male face with heavyset proportions, short thinning hair, mustache, and goatee.
Use neutral expression and front-facing capture for base avatar setup.
Separate identity/source metadata from any generated mesh or texture asset.
